customAttributes.description:
Cats of Chaos

The owner of target permanent shuffles it into their library, then reveals the top card of their library. If it's a permanent card, they put it onto the battlefield.

When purchasing this unique product, please keep in mind that this card only appears in the Secret Lair Drop: Cats of Chaos and will ship out to you after the seller receives the product directly from Wizards of the Coast.The estimated time frame for sellers to receive stock is not fixed, so it could be anywhere between 1 - 10 weeks for delivery.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item. The estimated shipping time frame for this product varies as sellers receive this product(s) directly from Wizards of the Coast after 6/19/2026 during a 1-10 week timeframe.
customAttributes.flavorText: Their lives stretched before them, each more magnificent than the last.
